title: Resolve source-routing rule: SRD5: pressure / trace
description: Route: pressure / trace -> diagnostic or non-metric kappa/zeta relaxation only if neutral. Allowed condition: pressure trace produces no exterior kappa/zeta 1/r scalar charge unless a parent theorem routes it without double counting. Forbidden condition: pressure trace creates exterior kappa Poisson charge or zeta mass route. Consequence: pressure/trace cannot become a second scalar mass source by declaration..
